text.title: Dark Knowledge Extraction Protocol Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example of Dark Knowledge Extraction Protocol producing a valid report artefact, anonymised for portability.

step.name: trigger
step.text: Quarterly cycle pulled the Dark Knowledge Extraction Protocol methodology to synthesise the corpus. Applies-If held: corpus >= 5 transcripts; downstream consumer is the product backlog; >= 2 days of researcher time available.

step.name: apply-rules
step.text: Walked the rule set against the corpus; r1-r4 passed; r5 required adding a backlog table because the first draft was a narrative without per-theme actions.

step.name: produce
step.text: Filled the report template with severity-ranked findings and per-finding owners; cited 3 input artefacts by name.

step.name: validate
step.text: Ran scripts/validate-dark-knowledge-extraction-protocol.py --file <path>; validator returned 0; the report shipped to PM + marketing + sales.

text.example: Applies-If held → inputs reachable → rules walked → artefact filled → validator returned 0 → owner signed off → downstream consumer registered.
